name: CMDB Health Check Agentic Workflow
serviceNowSurface: AI Agent Studio plus CMDB read-only analysis
trigger: Manual assessment request from a platform owner
businessOutcome: Help a platform team identify CMDB health issues and create a prioritized remediation plan without making automatic production changes.
steps: Capture assessment scope and target CI classes.
Read health signals and known exception rules.
Group issues by business impact and remediation effort.
Draft recommended actions with affected record estimates.
Route any write action to human approval and change control.
Produce an executive summary and practitioner task list.
approvalPoints: Before sending a report outside the platform team
tests: Empty scope returns a clarification request.
Read-only mode produces recommendations but no writes.
